lore:quest.name: The Last Caravan
lore:quest.description: Orin Fairwind's final supply run is the only thing between Elderfall and empty larders. Escort the caravan through two and a half minutes of Corrupted ambushes and keep Orin alive.
steps: Accept the quest from Kestrel Thorn.
Return to Kestrel and choose 'Signal the caravan' when ready to fight.
Defend Orin's caravan for 150 seconds against three ambush waves.
The quest completes automatically if the caravan survives; if Orin falls, signal Kestrel to try again.
